eval_results.name: multi-document-batch
eval_results.key_finding: All 4 documents processed; 2/4 passed (PRD-001, ARCH-001); 2/4 failed (PRD-002 missing Scope, US-010 missing AC)

strengths: Accurate detection of missing required sections in PRD and User Story formats
Clear chain visualization showing exact gap positions in PRD→Architecture→Story chain
Precise broken reference identification with document IDs named explicitly
Efficient batch processing with per-document and aggregate reporting
Actionable remediation guidance for every violation detected
recommendations: Test with real project documents spanning multiple UPM iterations
Add edge cases for circular references between documents
Test partial chain scenarios where only some links exist
